content.text: Aaaaaahahaha it’s not enough to fork all our code, rebrand it and lie its theirs; copy paste random chunks of our papers, and defraud their investors with a nonsensical mishmash. Tron also can’t even think of an original logo 🤯🤣

author.bio: Building a better Internet for people to move information freely and safely.
author.name: BitTorrent Inc.

content.text:
✨#BTFS Rebrand✨

To convey the idea & vision of #BTFS in a better way, #BTFS will rebrand itself with new logo👇 during the upcoming release of #BTFS v1.1.0🆕
#BTFS's mission is to provide a content-addressable, P2P mechanism for better storing & sharing digital content. #BTT
